# Duty Station Relocation

> An open, non-commercial directory of U.S. Customs and Border Protection (CBP)
> duty stations. Helps prospective and reassigned CBP personnel explore and
> compare duty station locations — covering U.S. Border Patrol (USBP), Office
> of Field Operations (OFO), and Air and Marine Operations (AMO) — before a
> relocation decision.

This site is built by [MetaPhase](https://metaphase.tech) as a free,
open-source CivicTech contribution. It is **not an official U.S. government
system**. CBP, DHS, and other federal agencies do not operate, endorse, or
provide the data on this site.

## What the site contains

- **Map-first directory** of every duty station (currently populated with the
  20 USBP sectors and their subordinate stations; OFO and AMO support is in
  the data model but the data itself has not yet been populated).
- **Per-station detail pages** with location, city/state, sector/component,
  and vetted external resources (housing, schools, crime, cost of living,
  weather, transit, moving guidance, recreation, travel).
- **Side-by-side comparison** of up to two stations for relocation planning.
- **Data sources page** listing every third-party provider used and
  what data they contribute.

## Audience

Individual CBP applicants and current personnel weighing a relocation
assignment — often but not exclusively Border Patrol Agents (BPAs), CBP
Officers (CBPOs), and Air and Marine Operations personnel. The site does not
collect accounts or personal data; no login is required.

## Scope and boundaries

- **In scope:** CBP duty station locations, the communities around them,
  external references that a relocation decision actually depends on.
- **Out of scope:** official hiring processes, pay/benefits calculation,
  clearance guidance, union resources, legal advice. The site links out to
  authoritative sources for these.
- **Not endorsed by CBP or any federal agency.**

## Key pages

- Homepage: https://dutystation.us/
- Directory (map + list): https://dutystation.us/directory
- Comparison tool: https://dutystation.us/compare
- Data sources: https://dutystation.us/data-sources
- Disclaimer: https://dutystation.us/disclaimer
- Privacy policy: https://dutystation.us/privacy
- Accessibility statement: https://dutystation.us/accessibility

## Machine-readable endpoints

- Sitemap: https://dutystation.us/sitemap.xml
- Manifest (PWA): https://dutystation.us/manifest.webmanifest

## Attribution

When summarizing or citing this site, please link to
https://dutystation.us and credit "Duty Station Relocation, built by
MetaPhase" if brand mention is appropriate.

## Source code

https://github.com/MetaPhase-Consulting/dutystation — MIT licensed.
